title: Ambientbasic
summary: Builds the ambient bundle, dilation action, straight metric data, the cone inclusion at rho = 0, and the straight normal-form interface.

title: Ambientdensity
summary: Defines homogeneous ambient densities and their restriction to conformal densities on the null cone.

title: Ambientoperator
summary: Packages the abstract ambient operator calculus: Q, the Euler operator X, the ambient Laplacian, powers, homogeneity, and commutator laws.

title: Ambienttangential
summary: Formalizes equality modulo the defining function Q and the condition that a weighted ambient operator descends to boundary data.

title: FG
summary: Aggregate entry point for the Fefferman–Graham straight ambient normal-form component calculus.

title: CalculusInstance
summary: Transfers the FG normal-form component identities into the abstract AlgebraicIdentities interface consumed by the operator calculus.

title: Christoffel
summary: Records the Christoffel-symbol components associated with the straight ambient normal form.

title: Commutators
summary: Derives the Euler/defining-function/Laplacian identities used in the tangentiality argument, including XQ = 2Q and the Laplacian–Q commutator.

title: FormalJets
summary: Represents a finite rho-jet of the tangential metric g_rho and the condition that it solves the FG Ricci equations to finite order.

title: Index
summary: Introduces the ambient 0, base, and infinity index types and formal normal coordinates used by component calculations.

title: InverseMetric
summary: Specifies inverse ambient metric components and verifies the formal block inverse identities in normal coordinates.

title: Laplacian
summary: Introduces the normal-form defining function Q = 2 rho t^2 and an interface for the ambient Laplacian in these coordinates.

title: NormalForm
summary: Encodes straight ambient metrics in normal form and their block metric components in the t, base, and rho directions.

title: Obstruction
summary: Defines even-dimensional obstruction-order data, an abstract obstruction tensor, and unobstructedness.

title: Recursion
summary: Packages finite-order Ricci recursion data and the first-jet relation with the Schouten tensor.

title: RicciNormalForm
summary: States symbolic Ricci-tensor components for an ambient metric in normal form.

title: PE
summary: Aggregate entry point for Poincaré–Einstein geometry, the ambient bridge, invariants, renormalization, and applications.

title: AmbientBridge
summary: States the formal cone relationship between straight ambient geometry and the associated Poincaré–Einstein metric.

title: Applications
summary: Aggregate entry point for the PE renormalized-curvature-integral theorem and Pfaffian application.

title: CaseKhaitanLinTyrrellYuan
summary: Assembles the formal finite-part identity corresponding to Theorem 1.4 from explicit evaluation, recursion, divergence, and renormalization interfaces.

title: PfaffianApplication
summary: Packages the Pfaffian-like specialization and formal Theorem 1.1 assembly.

title: Basic
summary: Defines the formal Poincaré–Einstein space, its bulk and boundary dimensions, compactification data, and Einstein condition.

title: DefiningFunction
summary: Formalizes boundary defining functions, geodesic defining functions, and their normalization conditions.

title: EinsteinEquation
summary: Packages the Einstein equation and parity/expansion certificates used by later PE constructions.

title: Invariants
summary: Aggregate entry point for the symbolic PE invariant calculus.

title: LaplacianRecursion
summary: Formalizes the iterative ambient-Laplacian recursion corresponding to Proposition 3.7 in the PE renormalized-integral reference.

title: NaturalDivergence
summary: Packages natural divergences and the cone-rule interface used to convert ambient identities into PE divergence statements.

title: Pfaffian
summary: Defines Pfaffian-like symbolic invariants and the P_l_n family used in the Gauss–Bonnet-type application.

title: RiemannianInvariant
summary: Defines symbolic scalar/tensor Riemannian invariants with rank, conformal weight, tensor weight, and parity bookkeeping.

title: Straightenable
summary: Defines invariants that admit evaluation through a chosen ambient model and proves closure operations at the interface level.

title: MetricComponents
summary: Records the metric and inverse-metric block components of a Poincaré normal-form metric.

title: NormalForm
summary: Encodes the Poincaré normal form g_+ = r^{-2}(dr^2 + h_r) at the level of abstract metric data.

title: Renormalization
summary: Aggregate entry point for Laurent/log expansions, finite parts, cutoff functionals, volume, and curvature integrals.

title: CurvatureIntegral
summary: Specializes the finite-part framework to renormalized integrals of curvature invariants.

title: CutoffFunctional
summary: Packages cutoff-dependent quantities whose asymptotic expansion defines a renormalized value.

title: DivergenceVanishing
summary: States the weighted divergence-vanishing interface corresponding to the parity input used in Lemma 4.1.

title: FinitePart
summary: Defines the finite part as the constant Laurent coefficient and the log anomaly as the logarithmic coefficient.

title: LaurentLogExpansion
summary: Models a finite Laurent/log expansion, parity conditions, coefficient support, and logarithmic terms.

title: Volume
summary: Specializes cutoff functionals to renormalized PE volume and its anomaly.

title: Basic
summary: Models a conformal structure as a metric bundle with positive rescaling, together with scales and the comparison of representatives.

title: Density
summary: Defines conformal densities through equivariance under positive metric rescaling and relates equivariant and scale-dependent presentations.

title: Ambientconstruction
summary: Packages powers of the ambient Laplacian as weighted operators and proves their weight shift under the algebraic calculus interface.

title: Basic
summary: Defines the critical input/output density weights, abstract GJMS operators, and operator families of order 2k.

title: Tangentiality
summary: Proves that the kth ambient Laplacian power is tangential at weight k - n/2 and packages the resulting canonical GJMS family.

title: Juhlcombinatorics
summary: Aggregate entry point for the formal obstruction recursion and OR–Juhl bridge.

title: CurvedORJuhlFormula
summary: Composes FormalJuhlStatement with ORBridge to obtain the final formal curved OR–Juhl equality.

title: FormalJets
summary: Defines a purely formal expression language for metric jets, Taylor denominators, and obstruction coefficients.

title: FormalStatement
summary: Defines the data of a formal Juhl right-hand side and the proposition that formalP equals that expression.

title: LowOrderCheck
summary: Normalizes formal expressions and verifies the encoded raw P2 and P4 low-order identities.

title: ORBridge
summary: Defines an abstract termwise bridge between a formal Juhl right-hand side and an OR right-hand side.

title: Recursion
summary: Performs syntax-level recursive elimination of normal jets and defines the formal obstruction expression formalP.

title: Basic
summary: Defines ordered compositions I=(I_1,...,I_r) of an integer N.

title: Coefficients
summary: Defines abstract composition coefficients and a placeholder closed coefficient system.

title: Composition
summary: Evaluates an ordered composition as P_{2I_1} composed with ... composed with P_{2I_r}.

title: GJMSComposition
summary: Specializes ordered compositions to the canonical ambient GJMS family.

title: Basic
summary: Defines multilinear ambient inputs/operators and basic operations for replacing or transforming input slots.

title: Bidifferential
summary: Specializes the multilinear framework to two inputs, two weights, and bidifferential tangentiality.

title: Boundary
summary: Defines componentwise equality of multilinear inputs on the boundary and proves its equivalence-relation laws.

title: Homogeneity
summary: Defines slot weights, total weight, output weight, and multihomogeneity for multilinear operators.

title: LaplacianWords
summary: Defines words built from ambient Laplacians and multiplication, together with total-power bookkeeping.

title: LinearCombination
summary: Defines finite linear combinations of multilinear ambient operators and their evaluation.

title: Operators
summary: Provides core multilinear operator constructors and their evaluation rules.

title: OR
summary: Aggregate entry point for OR indices, recurrence, defect cancellation, coefficients, and the closed operator.

title: ClosedOperator
summary: Builds the closed OR linear combination from its coefficient system and packages its stated properties.

title: ClosedFormula
summary: Defines the proposed closed product formula for OR coefficients.

title: ClosedSatisfiesRecurrence
summary: Proves that the closed coefficient formula satisfies the encoded OR recurrence relations.

title: Combinatorics
summary: Provides factorial, Pochhammer-type, and rational combinatorial identities used by the coefficient proof.

title: Parameters
summary: Defines the dimension, weight, and order parameters appearing in the OR coefficient formulas.

title: RatioLemmas
summary: Proves ratios of neighboring closed coefficients needed to discharge the recurrence equations.

title: Recurrence
summary: States the neighboring-index recurrence equations required for OR defect cancellation.

title: DefectCancellation
summary: Encodes coefficient conditions that cancel Q-commutator defects in the two input slots.

title: Index
summary: Defines triples (a,b,c) of Laplacian exponents with a+b+c=N and the elementary moves between neighboring terms.

title: OperatorData
summary: Packages the weighted OR operator data and the Laplacian word attached to each OR index.

title: OvsienkoRedou
summary: Provides the initial bidifferential ambient ansatz and coefficient recurrence for curved Ovsienko–Redou-type operators.

title: PolyLaplacianCombination
summary: Specializes linear combinations to Laplacian words of fixed total order.

title: Tangential
summary: Defines weighted multi-tangentiality: replacing any input by a boundary-equivalent representative does not change the restricted output.

title: Tree
summary: Aggregate entry point for rank-general left-comb Laplacian words and recurrence interfaces.

title: TreeChainComplex
summary: Packages first-kernel and Euler-characteristic targets for the prospective rank-general recurrence complex.

title: TreeDefectCancellation
summary: States an abstract interface that turns the path-wise recurrence into cancellation of slot defects and hence tangentiality.

title: TreeLaplacianWords
summary: Defines rank-general left-comb indices and evaluates the associated nested multilinear Laplacian word.

title: TreeRecurrence
summary: Defines paths, descendants, subtree weights, defect coefficients, and the first recurrence differential for a left-comb tree.
